theme: The skiller-in-app re-ground — a field-hardening release (v1.3b/v1.10b lineage) triggered by a LANDED platform structural change: the skiller service + its DB schema merged into app (domain -> the public schema, table names unchanged skiller.X -> public.X; RPC -> backend; the skiller GraphQL subgraph gone -> 4 subgraphs; skiller repo/container removed). Re-fit the rext tooling + corpus + stacks to the merged platform and PROVED /dev-up + /demo-up still work end-to-end cold. Strictly sequential M208 (re-sync + live de-risk) -> M209 (rext re-point skiller.*->public.* + snapshot recapture + cache-key digest narrowing) -> M210 (flip 6 rext-facing tooling-doc bodies to public.*) -> M211 (iterative, closed-on-gate 6/6: cache-migration recapture + build-scratch-resync root-fix + migrate-dev.sh cold DB-init; M42 coverage both vantages + v2.0 Playthroughs 10/11 GREEN on the merged platform). Tooling (rext) + docs (rosetta) + stack-re-sync ONLY — ZERO platform-repo edits. ZERO net-new third-party deps (a schema re-point adds no imports).
code_location: TWO-REPO split. rext code-of-record (SEPARATE gitignored git repo — the tag IS the record): rosetta-extensions @ tag quick-change-m211 = HEAD 7906f3f (post-harden + close-release fixes). The v2.1 code is the skiller.*->public.* re-point (stack-snapshot taxonomy const + digest-narrowing + MinRows floor; stack-seeding 5 real-SQL files + goldens; the small-module probes) + the M211 bring-up tooling (dev-stack/migrate-dev.sh; the cache-migration re-key; demo-stack build-scratch re-sync + offset-reuse guard + academy URL + cross-port hook; playthroughs run-playthroughs.sh --reset roster-refresh). Per-milestone tag: quick-change-m209 (the mid-release rext state); quick-change-m211 (final). On-box consumption pin: .agentspace/rext.tag = quick-change-m211 (re-pinned from v1.10.1 at M211). rosetta doc-half: release/02.10-quick-change (design + 4 milestone branches merged --no-ff).

rext_go_test_funcs.delta_vs_prev_release: +19 vs v2.0's 1745 (every module flat-or-up). M209 +18 (a skiller.*->public.* fake-Conn matcher rename [count-preserving] + harden: stack-snapshot +17, stack-seeding +1); M211 +1 (playthroughs RosterRefreshGate).
rext_go_test_funcs.go_test: go test ./... EXIT 0 on all 6 modules (go1.25.12)
rext_go_test_funcs.counting_method: grep '^func (Test|Fuzz)' per module at tag quick-change-m211=7906f3f; cross-checked vs M209 metrics (1763) + M211's +1 = 1764.

ts_unit.delta_vs_prev_release: +3 vs v2.0's 100 (stack-verify/e2e coverage-manifest 29->32 from the 15->14 service re-ground + the cross-port classifier dedup; playthroughs/e2e 58 flat).
ts_unit.tsc: clean (stack-verify/e2e gained typescript + tsconfig.json in close-release Fix B; typecheck exit 0)

live_playthroughs.note: The v2.0 10-Playthrough suite (6 employee + 4 manager + 1 declared in-manifest TODO) was RE-PROVEN GREEN on the MERGED (skiller-in-app) platform at M211 as a bring-up-acceptance gate — 10/11 green on the genuinely-cold reset-to-seed demo. Unchanged vs v2.0.
